A clear description of what went wrong.

## Expected behavior

What you expected instead.

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

- **Install method:** prebuilt binary / built from source / package manager

- **Model:** e.g. `claude-sonnet-4-6`

Paste relevant output. If the crash produced a stack trace, include the whole thing.

## Additional context
